get.description: Returns a paginated list of pools

parameters.name: page_size
parameters.description: Number of pools to return per page. Max 1000

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: Search query used to match pools by name, tokens, or address

parameters.name: sort_by
parameters.description:
Sort results by one or more fields

Format:
- Time-windowed metrics: `<metric>_<window>:<direction>`
- Non-windowed metrics: `<field>:<direction>`

- `direction`: `asc` or `desc`
- `window` (when applicable): `5m` `30m` `1h` `2h` `4h` `12h` `24h`

Available fields:
- Time-windowed metrics: `volume_*` `fee_*` `fee_tvl_ratio_*` `apr_*`
- Non-windowed metrics: `tvl` `fee_pct` `bin_step` `pool_created_at` `farm_apy`

Default: `volume_24h:desc`

Examples:
- `volume_24h:desc`
- `fee_1h:asc`
- `tvl:desc`

parameters.name: filter_by
parameters.description:
Conditions to filter documents by field values

Format: `<expr> [&& <expr> ...]`

Where each expression is: `<field><op><value>`

Allowed fields:
- Numeric: `tvl` `volume_*` `fee_*` `fee_tvl_ratio_*` `apr_*`
- Boolean: `is_blacklisted`
- Text: `pool_address` `name` `token_x` `token_y`

Operators:
- Numeric: `=` `>` `>=` `<` `<=`
- Boolean: `=true` `=false`
- Text:
  - exact match: `=<value>`
  - multi-value OR: `=[value1|value2|...]`

Notes:
- Multiple expressions are combined using logical **AND** (`&&`)
- Whitespace around operators is ignored

Examples:
- `tvl>1000`
- `is_blacklisted=false && volume_24h>=50000`

dynamic_fee_pct.description: Dynamic fee rate. Which is equal to base fee + variable fee.

fee_tvl_ratio.description: Fee TVL ratio in percentage in different timeframes

has_farm.description: Whether the pool has a farm or not

is_blacklisted.description: Flag to indicate whether the pair is blacklisted

protocol_fees.description: Protocol fee data in different timeframes

reserve_x.description: Address of token X reserve of the liquidity pair

reserve_y.description: Address of token Y reserve of the liquidity pair

reward_mint_x.description: Address of the farming reward X of the liquidity pair

reward_mint_y.description: Address of the farming reward Y of the liquidity pair

token_x.description: Token X of the liquidity pair

token_x_amount.description: Token X amount the liquidity pair hold

token_y.description: Token Y of the liquidity pair

token_y_amount.description: Token Y amount the liquidity pair hold

tvl.description: Total liquidity the liquidity pair holding. Also known as Total Value Locked

parameters.name: page_size

get.description: Returns metadata and current state for a single pool

Returns OHLCV candles for a single pool over a time range

**Notes**
- If both `start_time` and `end_time` are provided, candles are returned in the range `[start_time, end_time]`
- If only one of `start_time` or `end_time` is provided, the missing bound is inferred using the selected `timeframe`
- If neither is provided, a default range is used based on `timeframe`

parameters.name: timeframe
parameters.description:
Candle interval

Allowed values `5m` `30m` `1h` `2h` `4h` `12h` `24h`

If omitted, the API uses `24h`

parameters.name: start_time
parameters.description:
Unix timestamp in seconds (inclusive)

If omitted, the API uses a default range based on `timeframe`

parameters.name: end_time
parameters.description:
Unix timestamp in seconds (inclusive)

If omitted, the API uses "now" as the end

get.description:
Returns historical volume for a pool aggregated into time buckets

**Notes**
- If both `start_time` and `end_time` are provided, the result covers the range `[start_time, end_time]`
- If only one of `start_time` or `end_time` is provided, the missing bound is inferred using the selected `timeframe`
- If neither is provided, a default range is used based on `timeframe`

parameters.name: timeframe
parameters.description:
Timeframe

Allowed values `5m` `30m` `1h` `2h` `4h` `12h` `24h`

If omitted, the API uses `24h`

parameters.name: start_time
parameters.description:
Unix timestamp in seconds (inclusive)

If omitted, the API uses a default range based on `timeframe`

parameters.name: end_time
parameters.description:
Unix timestamp in seconds (inclusive)

If omitted, the API uses "now" as the end

get.summary: Get user portfolio with all pools containing closed positions
get.description:
Returns a paginated list of pools where the user has closed positions,
sorted by most recent activity (last_closed_at DESC). The response includes:
- Pool metadata (address, token symbols, icons, fees)
- Aggregated PnL data (deposits, withdrawals, fees, total PnL)
- Per-token breakdowns (X and Y)

For detailed position history within each pool, call the /positions/{pool_address}/pnl endpoint.



# Arguments

* `user` - The wallet address of the user
* `page` - Page number for pagination (default: 1)
* `page_size` - Number of pools per page (default: 120, max: 365)
* `days_back` - Only include pools with positions closed within this many days (default: 90)

# Returns

* `200` - The user's portfolio with pool metadata and aggregated PnL
* `400` - Invalid user address or query parameters

parameters.name: days_back
parameters.description:
Only include pools with positions closed within this many days
Applied only for closed positions
(minimum: 1, maximum: 365, default: 120)

get.summary: Get user portfolio with all pools containing open positions
get.description:
Returns a paginated list of pools where the user has open (active) positions.
The response includes:
- Pool metadata (address, bin step, base fee, token symbols, icons)
- Current balances and unclaimed fees in USD and SOL
- Pool metrics (TVL, 24h volume, fee/TVL ratio)
- List of open position addresses for each pool
- Aggregated total metrics across all pools (balances, unclaimed fees, PnL) in USD and SOL
- SOL price used for conversion (omitted if unavailable)

Results can be sorted by various metrics and support pagination.

# Arguments

* `user` - The wallet address of the user
* `page` - Page number for pagination (default: 1, minimum: 1)
* `page_size` - Number of pools per page (default: 20, maximum: 50)
* `sort_by` - Field to sort by: `current_balances`, `unclaimed_fee`, `pool_tvl`,
  `pool_volume_24h`, or `fee_per_tvl_24h` (default: `current_balances`)
* `sort_direction` - Sort direction: `asc` or `desc` (default: `desc`)

# Returns

* `200` - The user's open portfolio with pool metadata, balances, and total metrics
* `400` - Invalid user address or query parameters

parameters.name: sort_by
parameters.description: Sort by field, default is current_balances

400.description: Invalid user address or query parameters

get.summary: Get total portfolio PnL across all pools
get.description:
Returns the all-time total PnL in USD and percentage change across all user's pools.
This aggregates data from all closed positions across the entire portfolio.

# Arguments

* `user` - The wallet address of the user

# Returns

* `200` - The user's total portfolio PnL
* `400` - Invalid user address or query parameters

400.description: Invalid user address or unsupported product type

get.summary: Get the historical events for a position
get.description:
This endpoint returns the historical actions for a position.

# Arguments

* `address` - The address of the position

# Returns

* `200` - The historical actions for the position

parameters.name: event_type
parameters.description:
Filter by event type (add, remove, claim_fee, claim_reward).
If not provided, returns all event types.

parameters.name: order_direction
parameters.description:
Order direction for sorting events by block time.
- `asc`: Oldest events first
- `desc`: Most recent events first (default)

get.summary: Get position PnL data (open and closed positions with on-the-fly calculation)
get.description:
Returns positions for a specific pool and user with calculated PnL values.
Includes SOL-denominated amounts when SOL price is available (omitted otherwise).
Results can be filtered by status (open/closed) and are paginated.

# Arguments

* `pool_address` - The address of the pool
* `user` - The user address
* `status` - Filter by status: "open", "closed", or omit for all (default: all)
* `page` - Page number starting from 1 (default: 1)

# Returns

* `200` - Paginated list of positions with PnL data in USD and SOL

parameters.name: page_size
parameters.description: Page size for pagination (minimum: 1, maximum: 100, default: 20)

get.description: Returns aggregated protocol-level metrics across all pools

Paginated per-pool summary of a wallet's closed limit orders, sorted by
most recent close time first. Cancel-only orders are not yet closed and
remain in the open endpoints.

get.summary: Get Closed Limit Orders For Pool
get.description:
Paginated per-order lifecycle view for a wallet's closed limit orders in a
single pool, covering deposits, withdrawals, bonus earned, and fill totals.
Sorted by most recent close time first.
get.operationId: Get Closed Limit Orders For Pool

get.description:
Paginated per-pool summary of a wallet's currently-open limit orders,
sorted by deposit USD descending. An order stays in this view until it is
closed on-chain; cancels alone do not remove it.

get.summary: Get Open Limit Orders For Pool
get.description:
Paginated per-order detail for a wallet's currently-open limit orders in a
single pool, with per-bin fill distribution and live pool state. Sorted by
placement time, newest first.
get.operationId: Get Open Limit Orders For Pool

get.description:
Total realised bonus a wallet has claimed on a single pool, USD and SOL
values use cancel-time prices.

Aggregate totals for a wallet's limit orders across every pool: open and
closed counts, total deposit value, total bonus earned, and the live
(current-spot) dollar value of every still-open order.
Returns combined total claimed fees and rewards for a wallet in a specific pool

BonusClaimedResponse.description:
Realised bonus a wallet has claimed on one pool. Aggregates every cancel
the wallet has on the pool, including cancels on orders that have not yet
been closed (bonus is paid at cancel time). USD and SOL values use
cancel-time prices, not current spot.

cancel_event_count.description: Number of distinct cancel events contributing to these totals.

total_bonus_x.description: Bonus token X claimed, in token X display units (decimals applied).

total_bonus_x_sol.description: Bonus token X claimed, in SOL (cancel-time SOL price).

total_bonus_x_usd.description: Bonus token X claimed, in USD (cancel-time price).

total_bonus_y.description: Bonus token Y claimed, in token Y display units (decimals applied).

total_bonus_y_sol.description: Bonus token Y claimed, in SOL (cancel-time SOL price).

total_bonus_y_usd.description: Bonus token Y claimed, in USD (cancel-time price).

ClosedLimitOrderDetail.description:
Per-order lifecycle row for a closed limit order in a specific pool.
Pool-level metadata lives once at the top of the response.

filled_input_amount.description: Filled amount, in input (deposit) token display units.

filled_pct.description: Percentage of the order's deposit that was filled before it closed.

input_token.description: Symbol of the deposited token (X for ask, Y for bid).

input_token_mint.description: Mint address of the deposited token.

is_ask_side.description:
`true` for an ask (selling token X for Y), `false` for a bid
(buying X with Y).

last_closed_at.description: Block time of the close, in Unix seconds.

lower_pool_price.description: Lower bound of the order's price range, in token Y per token X.

opened_at.description: Block time of the placement, in Unix seconds.

output_amount_expected.description:
Expected output amount if the order had filled entirely at its
placement bin prices, in output-token display units.

output_token.description: Symbol of the expected fill token (Y for ask, X for bid).

output_token_mint.description: Mint address of the expected fill token.

received_output_amount.description:
Realised output amount the user received for the filled portion of
the order, in output-token display units. For an ask this equals
`total_withdrawal_y`; for a bid, `total_withdrawal_x`.

total_bonus_sol.description: Combined SOL value of bonus at cancel-time SOL prices.

total_bonus_usd.description: Combined USD value of bonus at cancel-time prices.

total_bonus_x.description: Token X bonus realised, in token X display units.

total_bonus_x_sol.description: SOL value of token X bonus at cancel-time SOL price.

total_bonus_x_usd.description: USD value of token X bonus at cancel-time price.

total_bonus_y.description: Token Y bonus realised, in token Y display units.

total_bonus_y_sol.description: SOL value of token Y bonus at cancel-time SOL price.

total_bonus_y_usd.description: USD value of token Y bonus at cancel-time price.

total_deposit_sol.description: SOL value of the deposit at placement time.

total_deposit_usd.description: USD value of the deposit at placement time (deposit side only).

total_deposit_x.description: Token X deposited at placement, in token X display units (`0` for a bid).

total_deposit_y.description: Token Y deposited at placement, in token Y display units (`0` for an ask).

total_withdrawal_sol.description: Combined SOL value of withdrawals at cancel-time SOL prices.

total_withdrawal_x.description: Token X withdrawn over the order's lifetime, in token X display units.

total_withdrawal_x_sol.description: SOL value of token X withdrawn at cancel-time SOL price.

total_withdrawal_x_usd.description: USD value of token X withdrawn at cancel-time price.

total_withdrawal_y.description: Token Y withdrawn over the order's lifetime, in token Y display units.

total_withdrawal_y_sol.description: SOL value of token Y withdrawn at cancel-time SOL price.

total_withdrawal_y_usd.description: USD value of token Y withdrawn at cancel-time price.

upper_pool_price.description: Upper bound of the order's price range, in token Y per token X.

ClosedLimitOrderPoolSummary.description:
Per-pool summary of a wallet's closed limit orders inside one pool.
Mirrors the open-pool summary fields and adds withdrawal totals plus the
most recent close time.

filled_pct.description: Overall fill percentage across the pool's closed orders.

fully_filled_orders.description: Number of those orders that were fully filled before closing.

last_closed_at.description: Block time of the most recent close in this pool, in Unix seconds.

max_limit_price.description:
Highest limit price (token Y per token X) across the pool's closed
orders. `0` when the pool has no closed orders.

min_limit_price.description:
Lowest limit price (token Y per token X) across the pool's closed
orders. `0` when the pool has no closed orders.

pool.description: Pool metadata (pair, tokens, fee, bin step, fee mode).

total_bonus_sol.description: Combined SOL value of bonus at cancel-time SOL prices.

total_bonus_usd.description: Combined USD value of bonus at cancel-time prices.

total_bonus_x.description: Token X bonus realised, in token X display units.

total_bonus_x_sol.description: SOL value of token X bonus at cancel-time SOL price.

total_bonus_x_usd.description: USD value of token X bonus at cancel-time price.

total_bonus_y.description: Token Y bonus realised, in token Y display units.

total_bonus_y_sol.description: SOL value of token Y bonus at cancel-time SOL price.

total_bonus_y_usd.description: USD value of token Y bonus at cancel-time price.

total_deposit_sol.description: Combined SOL value of deposits at placement time.

total_deposit_usd.description: Combined USD value of deposits (an ask deposits X, a bid deposits Y).

total_deposit_x.description: Token X deposited across ask orders, in token X display units.

total_deposit_x_sol.description: SOL value of token X deposits at placement time.

total_deposit_x_usd.description: USD value of token X deposits at placement time.

total_deposit_y.description: Token Y deposited across bid orders, in token Y display units.

total_deposit_y_sol.description: SOL value of token Y deposits at placement time.

total_deposit_y_usd.description: USD value of token Y deposits at placement time.

total_orders.description: Number of closed limit orders in this pool.

total_withdrawal_sol.description: Combined SOL value of withdrawals at cancel-time SOL prices.

total_withdrawal_usd.description: Combined USD value of withdrawals at cancel-time prices.

total_withdrawal_x.description:
Token X withdrawn (deposit returned and / or filled output), in token
X display units.

total_withdrawal_x_sol.description: SOL value of token X withdrawn at cancel-time SOL price.

total_withdrawal_x_usd.description: USD value of token X withdrawn at cancel-time price.

total_withdrawal_y.description:
Token Y withdrawn (deposit returned and / or filled output), in token
Y display units.

total_withdrawal_y_sol.description: SOL value of token Y withdrawn at cancel-time SOL price.

total_withdrawal_y_usd.description: USD value of token Y withdrawn at cancel-time price.

ClosedLimitOrdersForPoolResponse.description:
Response for the per-pool closed limit orders endpoint. Pool metadata is
emitted once at the top; per-order rows in `data` only carry order-specific
fields.

data.description: One row per closed limit order in this pool for the current page.

page_size.description: Page size used for this response.

pages.description: Total number of pages at the requested page size.

pool.description: Pool metadata (pair, tokens, fee, bin step, fee mode).

total.description: Total number of closed limit orders the wallet has in this pool.

fee_tvl_ratio_tw.description: Time window to aggregate fee tvl ratio. Returns Max

GetPortfolioQuery.description: Query parameters for getting user portfolio

days_back.description:
Only include pools with positions closed within this many days
Applied only for closed positions
(minimum: 1, maximum: 365, default: 120)

GetPortfolioResponse.description: User portfolio response with aggregated pool data

totalPositions.description: Total number of closed positions across all pools

GetPortfolioTotalQuery.description: Query parameters for getting portfolio totals

GetPositionHistoricalEventsQuery.description: Query parameters for getting historical events for a position

oneOf.description:
Filter by event type (add, remove, claim_fee, claim_reward).
If not provided, returns all event types.

Order direction for sorting events by block time.
- `asc`: Oldest events first
- `desc`: Most recent events first (default)

LimitOrderPoolDetails.description:
Pool-level metadata shared across all limit-order responses for a given
pool. The same shape is emitted on every endpoint so clients can render
the pool header from one struct.

base_fee.description: Pool base fee, expressed as a percentage.

bin_step.description: Pool bin step in basis points.

collect_fee_mode.description:
Token the pool collects swap fees in, which determines where bonus
accrues. `0` = `InputOnly` (bonus flows to the deposit/input token of
each order); `1` = `OnlyY` (bonus is always paid in token Y).

LimitOrderSummaryResponse.description:
Aggregate totals for a wallet's limit orders across every pool.

`_sol` fields use the placement-time SOL price for deposits and the
current-spot SOL price for bonus and current-value rollups. A limit order
is considered open until it is closed on-chain; cancels alone do not close
it.

closed_orders.description: Number of limit orders that have been closed on-chain.

open_orders.description: Number of limit orders that are still open (no close event).

total_bonus_sol.description: Total SOL equivalent of `total_bonus_usd` (cancel-event SOL price).

total_bonus_usd.description: Total USD value of bonus **already realized from cancel events**

total_claimable_bonus_sol.description: SOL equivalent of `total_claimable_bonus_usd` at the current SOL spot price.

total_claimable_bonus_usd.description: Currently-claimable bonus across every open LO. Priced at current spot.

total_current_value_sol.description: SOL equivalent of `total_current_value_usd` at the current SOL spot price.

total_current_value_usd.description:
Live dollar value of every currently-open LO across every pool, priced at
current spot: unfilled input + filled output + unrealized bonus. Equal to
`Σ open_pools[*].total_current_value_usd`.

total_deposit_sol.description: Total SOL value of currently-open order deposits (placement-time SOL price).

total_deposit_usd.description: Total USD value of currently-open order deposits.

LimitOrdersPaginationQuery.description: Query parameters for paginated limit order endpoints.

LimitOrdersWalletPath.description: Path parameter shared by wallet-scoped limit-order endpoints.

LimitOrdersWalletPoolPath.description: Path parameters shared by pool-scoped limit-order endpoints.

OpenLimitOrderBinPoint.description:
Per-bin point in an open limit order's distribution. Amounts are in the
input (deposit) token's display units — token X for an ask, token Y for a
bid.

deposit_amount.description: Original deposit at this bin in input-token display units.

fill_status.description: Fill state of this bin: `not_filled`, `partial_filled`, or `fulfilled`.

fulfilled_amount.description: Filled portion of the bin in input-token display units.

output_received_amount.description:
Output-token amount received from this bin's fills, in output-token
display units.

price.description: Price at this bin, token Y per token X.

unfilled_amount.description: Remaining unfilled portion of the bin in input-token display units.

OpenLimitOrderDetail.description:
Per-order detail for an open limit order inside a specific pool. Amounts
use `input`/`output` terminology: input is the deposited token, output is
the expected fill token. Pool-level metadata is emitted once at the top of
the response.

bin_distribution.description: Per-bin distribution for this order, sorted by `bin_id` ascending.

filled_input_amount.description: Filled amount, in input (deposit) token display units.

filled_pct.description: Percentage of the order's deposit that has been filled (0–100).

input_amount.description: Total deposited amount, in input-token display units.

input_amount_sol.description: SOL value of the deposit at placement time.

input_amount_usd.description: USD value of the deposit at placement time.

input_token.description: Symbol of the deposited token (X for ask, Y for bid).

input_token_mint.description: Mint address of the deposited token.

is_ask_side.description:
`true` for an ask (selling token X for Y), `false` for a bid
(buying X with Y).

lower_pool_price.description: Lower bound of the order's price range, in token Y per token X.

nearest_unfilled_bin_id.description:
Bin id of the nearest still-unfilled (or partially-filled) bin
relative to the active bin. `null` only when every bin in the order
is fully filled.

nearest_unfilled_bin_price.description:
Price at `nearest_unfilled_bin_id`, in the same units as
`current_pool_price` on the response wrapper. `null` only when the
order is fully filled.

opened_at.description: Block time of the placement, in Unix seconds.

output_amount_expected.description:
Expected output amount if the order fills entirely at its placement
bin prices, in output-token display units.

output_token.description: Symbol of the expected fill token (Y for ask, X for bid).

output_token_mint.description: Mint address of the expected fill token.

total_bonus_sol.description: Combined SOL value of bonus at the current SOL spot price.

total_bonus_usd.description: Combined USD value of bonus at current spot prices.

total_bonus_x.description: Token X bonus accrued by this order, in token X display units.

total_bonus_y.description: Token Y bonus accrued by this order, in token Y display units.

total_filled_amount.description:
Filled amount expressed in output-token display units — an estimate
of what the order has received so far at placement bin prices. The
exact realised output is only finalised at cancel time.

total_filled_amount_sol.description: SOL value of the filled portion at the current SOL spot price.

total_filled_amount_usd.description: USD value of the filled portion at current spot prices.

total_unfilled_amount.description:
Remaining unfilled deposit, in input-token display units
(`input_amount − filled_input_amount`).

total_unfilled_amount_sol.description: SOL value of the unfilled portion at the current SOL spot price.

total_unfilled_amount_usd.description: USD value of the unfilled portion at current spot prices.

upper_pool_price.description: Upper bound of the order's price range, in token Y per token X.

OpenLimitOrderPoolSummary.description:
Per-pool summary of a wallet's currently-open limit orders inside one
pool. Carries pool metadata, totals across every open order in the pool,
and the live (current-spot) dollar value of all open positions in the
pool.

filled_pct.description: Overall fill percentage across every open order in this pool.

fully_filled_orders.description: Number of those orders whose every bin has been fully filled.

max_limit_price.description:
Highest limit price (token Y per token X) across the pool's open
orders. `0` when the pool has no open orders.

min_limit_price.description:
Lowest limit price (token Y per token X) across the pool's open
orders. `0` when the pool has no open orders.

pool.description: Pool metadata (pair, tokens, fee, bin step, fee mode).

total_bonus_sol.description: Combined SOL value of bonus at the current SOL spot price.

total_bonus_usd.description: Combined USD value of bonus at current spot prices.

total_bonus_x.description:
Token X bonus accrued across the pool's open orders, in token X
display units.

total_bonus_y.description:
Token Y bonus accrued across the pool's open orders, in token Y
display units.

total_current_value_sol.description: SOL equivalent of `total_current_value_usd` at the current SOL spot price.

total_current_value_usd.description:
Live dollar value of every currently-open order in this pool at
current spot prices: remaining unfilled input plus filled output
plus unrealised bonus.

total_deposit_sol.description: Combined SOL value of deposits at placement time.

total_deposit_usd.description:
Combined USD value of deposits across both sides of the pool's open
orders (an ask deposits X, a bid deposits Y).

total_deposit_x.description: Token X deposited across ask orders, in token X display units.

total_deposit_x_sol.description: SOL value of token X deposits at placement time.

total_deposit_x_usd.description: USD value of token X deposits at placement time.

total_deposit_y.description: Token Y deposited across bid orders, in token Y display units.

total_deposit_y_sol.description: SOL value of token Y deposits at placement time.

total_deposit_y_usd.description: USD value of token Y deposits at placement time.

total_orders.description: Number of currently-open limit orders in this pool.

total_withdrawal_sol.description: Combined SOL value of withdrawals (cancel-time SOL price).

total_withdrawal_usd.description: Combined USD value of withdrawals (cancel-time price).

total_withdrawal_x.description: Token X withdrawn from cancels, in token X display units.

total_withdrawal_x_sol.description: SOL value of token X withdrawn (cancel-time SOL price).

total_withdrawal_x_usd.description: USD value of token X withdrawn from cancels (cancel-time price).

total_withdrawal_y.description: Token Y withdrawn from cancels, in token Y display units.

total_withdrawal_y_sol.description: SOL value of token Y withdrawn (cancel-time SOL price).

total_withdrawal_y_usd.description: USD value of token Y withdrawn from cancels (cancel-time price).

OpenLimitOrdersForPoolResponse.description:
Response for the per-pool open limit orders endpoint. Pool metadata and
live pool state are emitted once at the top; per-order rows in `data` only
carry order-specific fields.

current_pool_price.description: Pool's current price, in token Y per token X.

data.description: One row per open limit order in this pool for the current page.

page_size.description: Page size used for this response.

pages.description: Total number of pages at the requested page size.

pool.description: Pool metadata (pair, tokens, fee, bin step, fee mode).

total.description: Total number of open limit orders the wallet has in this pool.

items.description:
Per-pool summary of a wallet's closed limit orders inside one pool.
Mirrors the open-pool summary fields and adds withdrawal totals plus the
most recent close time.

filled_pct.description: Overall fill percentage across the pool's closed orders.

fully_filled_orders.description: Number of those orders that were fully filled before closing.

last_closed_at.description: Block time of the most recent close in this pool, in Unix seconds.

max_limit_price.description:
Highest limit price (token Y per token X) across the pool's closed
orders. `0` when the pool has no closed orders.

min_limit_price.description:
Lowest limit price (token Y per token X) across the pool's closed
orders. `0` when the pool has no closed orders.

pool.description: Pool metadata (pair, tokens, fee, bin step, fee mode).

total_bonus_sol.description: Combined SOL value of bonus at cancel-time SOL prices.

total_bonus_usd.description: Combined USD value of bonus at cancel-time prices.

total_bonus_x.description: Token X bonus realised, in token X display units.

total_bonus_x_sol.description: SOL value of token X bonus at cancel-time SOL price.

total_bonus_x_usd.description: USD value of token X bonus at cancel-time price.

total_bonus_y.description: Token Y bonus realised, in token Y display units.

total_bonus_y_sol.description: SOL value of token Y bonus at cancel-time SOL price.

total_bonus_y_usd.description: USD value of token Y bonus at cancel-time price.

total_deposit_sol.description: Combined SOL value of deposits at placement time.

total_deposit_usd.description: Combined USD value of deposits (an ask deposits X, a bid deposits Y).

total_deposit_x.description: Token X deposited across ask orders, in token X display units.

total_deposit_x_sol.description: SOL value of token X deposits at placement time.

total_deposit_x_usd.description: USD value of token X deposits at placement time.

total_deposit_y.description: Token Y deposited across bid orders, in token Y display units.

total_deposit_y_sol.description: SOL value of token Y deposits at placement time.

total_deposit_y_usd.description: USD value of token Y deposits at placement time.

total_orders.description: Number of closed limit orders in this pool.

total_withdrawal_sol.description: Combined SOL value of withdrawals at cancel-time SOL prices.

total_withdrawal_usd.description: Combined USD value of withdrawals at cancel-time prices.

total_withdrawal_x.description:
Token X withdrawn (deposit returned and / or filled output), in token
X display units.

total_withdrawal_x_sol.description: SOL value of token X withdrawn at cancel-time SOL price.

total_withdrawal_x_usd.description: USD value of token X withdrawn at cancel-time price.

total_withdrawal_y.description:
Token Y withdrawn (deposit returned and / or filled output), in token
Y display units.

total_withdrawal_y_sol.description: SOL value of token Y withdrawn at cancel-time SOL price.

total_withdrawal_y_usd.description: USD value of token Y withdrawn at cancel-time price.

items.description:
Per-pool summary of a wallet's currently-open limit orders inside one
pool. Carries pool metadata, totals across every open order in the pool,
and the live (current-spot) dollar value of all open positions in the
pool.

filled_pct.description: Overall fill percentage across every open order in this pool.

fully_filled_orders.description: Number of those orders whose every bin has been fully filled.

max_limit_price.description:
Highest limit price (token Y per token X) across the pool's open
orders. `0` when the pool has no open orders.

min_limit_price.description:
Lowest limit price (token Y per token X) across the pool's open
orders. `0` when the pool has no open orders.

pool.description: Pool metadata (pair, tokens, fee, bin step, fee mode).

total_bonus_sol.description: Combined SOL value of bonus at the current SOL spot price.

total_bonus_usd.description: Combined USD value of bonus at current spot prices.

total_bonus_x.description:
Token X bonus accrued across the pool's open orders, in token X
display units.

total_bonus_y.description:
Token Y bonus accrued across the pool's open orders, in token Y
display units.

total_current_value_sol.description: SOL equivalent of `total_current_value_usd` at the current SOL spot price.

total_current_value_usd.description:
Live dollar value of every currently-open order in this pool at
current spot prices: remaining unfilled input plus filled output
plus unrealised bonus.

total_deposit_sol.description: Combined SOL value of deposits at placement time.

total_deposit_usd.description:
Combined USD value of deposits across both sides of the pool's open
orders (an ask deposits X, a bid deposits Y).

total_deposit_x.description: Token X deposited across ask orders, in token X display units.

total_deposit_x_sol.description: SOL value of token X deposits at placement time.

total_deposit_x_usd.description: USD value of token X deposits at placement time.

total_deposit_y.description: Token Y deposited across bid orders, in token Y display units.

total_deposit_y_sol.description: SOL value of token Y deposits at placement time.

total_deposit_y_usd.description: USD value of token Y deposits at placement time.

total_orders.description: Number of currently-open limit orders in this pool.

total_withdrawal_sol.description: Combined SOL value of withdrawals (cancel-time SOL price).

total_withdrawal_usd.description: Combined USD value of withdrawals (cancel-time price).

total_withdrawal_x.description: Token X withdrawn from cancels, in token X display units.

total_withdrawal_x_sol.description: SOL value of token X withdrawn (cancel-time SOL price).

total_withdrawal_x_usd.description: USD value of token X withdrawn from cancels (cancel-time price).

total_withdrawal_y.description: Token Y withdrawn from cancels, in token Y display units.

total_withdrawal_y_sol.description: SOL value of token Y withdrawn (cancel-time SOL price).

total_withdrawal_y_usd.description: USD value of token Y withdrawn from cancels (cancel-time price).

dynamic_fee_pct.description: Dynamic fee rate. Which is equal to base fee + variable fee.

fee_tvl_ratio.description: Fee TVL ratio in percentage in different timeframes

has_farm.description: Whether the pool has a farm or not

is_blacklisted.description: Flag to indicate whether the pair is blacklisted

protocol_fees.description: Protocol fee data in different timeframes

reserve_x.description: Address of token X reserve of the liquidity pair

reserve_y.description: Address of token Y reserve of the liquidity pair

reward_mint_x.description: Address of the farming reward X of the liquidity pair

reward_mint_y.description: Address of the farming reward Y of the liquidity pair

token_x.description: Token X of the liquidity pair

token_x_amount.description: Token X amount the liquidity pair hold

token_y.description: Token Y of the liquidity pair

token_y_amount.description: Token Y amount the liquidity pair hold

tvl.description: Total liquidity the liquidity pair holding. Also known as Total Value Locked

protocol_fee_pct.description: Protocol fee rate. A cut from trade fee.

PoolOpenPortfolioItem.description: Aggregated portfolio data for a single pool

feePerTvl24h.description: User's fee per tvl in rolling 24h

listPositions.description: List of position addresses in pool

outOfRange.description:
Pool dynamic fields
Pool is out of range if one of the user's positions is out of range
If this is None, it means we couldn't determine out_of_range status

positionsOutOfRange.description: List of position addresses that are out of range

totalDepositSol.description: Total deposit in SOL (historical per-event SOL price)

PoolPortfolioItem.description: Aggregated portfolio data for a single pool

pnlSol.description: Total PnL in SOL (historical per-event SOL price)

pnlUsd.description: Total PnL in USD, including realized and unrealized

totalDepositSol.description: Total deposit in SOL (historical per-event SOL price)

totalFeeSol.description: Total claim fee in SOL (historical per-event SOL price)

totalWithdrawalSol.description: Total withdrawal in SOL (historical per-event SOL price)

dynamic_fee_pct.description: Dynamic fee rate. Which is equal to base fee + variable fee.

fee_tvl_ratio.description: Fee TVL ratio in percentage in different timeframes

has_farm.description: Whether the pool has a farm or not

is_blacklisted.description: Flag to indicate whether the pair is blacklisted

protocol_fees.description: Protocol fee data in different timeframes

reserve_x.description: Address of token X reserve of the liquidity pair

reserve_y.description: Address of token Y reserve of the liquidity pair

reward_mint_x.description: Address of the farming reward X of the liquidity pair

reward_mint_y.description: Address of the farming reward Y of the liquidity pair

token_x.description: Token X of the liquidity pair

token_x_amount.description: Token X amount the liquidity pair hold

token_y.description: Token Y of the liquidity pair

token_y_amount.description: Token Y amount the liquidity pair hold

tvl.description: Total liquidity the liquidity pair holding. Also known as Total Value Locked

totalPnlPctChange.description: Total PnL percentage change across all pools (USD)

totalPnlSol.description: Total PnL in SOL across all pools (historical per-event SOL price)

totalPnlSolPctChange.description: Total PnL percentage change across all pools (SOL)

totalPnlUsd.description:
Total amount deposited in USD across all pools
NOTE: Commented out for now, but may be needed in the future
Total PnL in USD across all pools

feePerTvl24h.description: User's fee per tvl in rolling 24h

oneOf.description: Live PnL, only for open positions

TotalMetrics.description: Total metrics related to user portfolio

totalPositions.description: Total number of open positions across all pools

balances.description: Total current position balances in USD

balancesSol.description: Total current position balances in SOL
